channel.title: Uncategorized on Chasing Dings!
channel.description: Recent content in Uncategorized on Chasing Dings!

item.title: Project64 and Beetle Adventure Racing
item.description:
It’s 1999, my old broken down Super Beetle is sitting in the driveway, probably waiting on another rebuilt part for its underpowered engine, and Volkswagen wants me to know that it’s about to release brand new Beetles, and I could get one.

If I were rich, maybe. I had a Nintendo64 and enough cash to buy Beetle Adventure Racing. The kids and I spent many days racing pixel Beetles around. I never did get a new Beetle. By the time my financial picture improved, I could afford a VW GTI.

item.title: MMO updates: Crowfall, EverQuest, Chocobo's Mystery Dungeon, DCUO
item.description:
I apologize for the brief news on Crowfall. I’d meant to get deeper into the PvE, but while I was building up my kingdom in the creative mode, the test server came down and I moved on to other things.

It’s been years since Chinese publishers ChangYou took over the Shadowbane IP, and eight or so since they released plans to relaunch it. Now, here in 2020, it looks like they are finally really relaunching the famed empire building, PvP MMO. Shadowbane was notable for the huge number of beast races available for play, as well as the EVE-like way armies could gather to siege or defend player-created cities.

item.title: Playing around with the template
item.description:
Blog is starting to look more like “my blog” now.

Pardon any mess.

The header images are going to be mostly EQ1 for now (from my old blog), but as I make more posts and turn any image posts into headers, they’ll start showing up, too.

item.title: So, you're back.
item.description:
Practicing a lot and trying very hard.

Yeaaahhhhh I’m back, but I’m not telling anyone until I have some stuff to show. The old blog is backed up riiiight here. I think I might be able to import it all, given time. No reason I can’t start blogging while I work on it.

What’s happened in the past… several years? A lot. Waaaay too much to talk about all at once. Things will come up when they come up and we’ll talk about it. I don’t play MMOs as much as I used to, but I still game quite a lot. I have all sorts of quarantine stuff I’m working on – and I guess this blog is one of those things.

item.title: Hello world!
item.description: Welcome to WordPress. This is your first post. Edit or delete it, then start blogging!
